user.title: WoowTech Fan Entity
user.description: Configure your fan entity using entity selectors and optional action scripts.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this fan entity.
data_description.switch_entity: Entity that controls power on/off (switch, input_boolean, fan).
data_description.speed_count: Number of discrete speed levels (e.g. 3 for low/medium/high).
data_description.preset_modes: Optional: Preset modes like Auto, Sleep, Smart.
data_description.percentage_entity: Entity to receive speed percentage from (input_number, number).
data_description.percentage_receive_template: Optional Jinja2 template to transform received percentage. Use {{ value }} for raw value.
data_description.percentage_input_min: Linear interpolation: minimum input value (e.g. 0 for ADC range 0-1023).
data_description.percentage_input_max: Linear interpolation: maximum input value (e.g. 1023 for ADC range 0-1023).
data_description.percentage_output_min: Linear interpolation: minimum output value (e.g. 0 for fan percentage 0-100).
data_description.percentage_output_max: Linear interpolation: maximum output value (e.g. 100 for fan percentage 0-100).
data_description.preset_mode_entity: Entity to receive preset mode from (input_select, select).
data_description.preset_mode_receive_template: Optional Jinja2 template to transform received preset mode. Use {{ value }} for raw value.
data_description.oscillating_entity: Entity to sync oscillation state with (switch, input_boolean).
data_description.direction_entity: Entity to receive direction from (input_select, select).
data_description.direction_receive_template: Optional Jinja2 template to transform received direction. Use {{ value }} for raw value.
data_description.set_percentage: Optional: Action script override for speed percentage changes.
data_description.set_preset_mode: Optional: Action script override for preset mode changes.
data_description.set_oscillating: Optional: Action script override for oscillation changes.
data_description.set_direction: Optional: Action script override for direction changes.
